descriptions.batch: Research and plan a large-scale change, then execute it in parallel across 5–30 isolated worktree agents that each open a PR.
descriptions.btw: Ask a quick side question without interrupting the main conversation
descriptions.claude-api: Build apps with the Claude API or Anthropic SDK.\nTRIGGER when: code imports `anthropic`/`@anthropic-ai/sdk`/`claude_agent_sdk`, or user asks to use Claude API, Anthropic SDKs, or Agent SDK.\nDO NOT TRIGGER when: code imports `openai`/other AI SDK, general programming, or ML/data-science tasks.
descriptions.claude-in-chrome: Automates your Chrome browser to interact with web pages - clicking elements, filling forms, capturing screenshots, reading console logs, and navigating sites. Opens pages in new tabs within your existing Chrome session. Requires site-level permissions before executing (configured in the extension).
descriptions.clear: Clear conversation history and free up context
descriptions.color: Set the prompt bar color for this session
descriptions.commit-push-pr: Commit, push, and open a PR
descriptions.compact: Clear conversation history but keep a summary in context. Optional: /compact [instructions for summarization]
descriptions.context: Visualize current context usage as a colored grid
descriptions.copy: Copy Claude's last response or a code block to clipboard
descriptions.cost: Show the total cost and duration of the current session
descriptions.debug: Enable debug logging for this session and help diagnose issues
descriptions.diff: View uncommitted changes and per-turn diffs
descriptions.doctor: Diagnose and verify your Claude Code installation and settings
descriptions.export: Export the current conversation to a file or clipboard
descriptions.extra-usage: Configure extra usage to keep working when limits are hit
descriptions.files: List all files currently in context
descriptions.fork: Create a fork of the current conversation at this point
descriptions.hooks: Manage hook configurations for tool events
descriptions.ide: Manage IDE integrations and show status
descriptions.init: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation
descriptions.init-verifiers: Create verifier skill(s) for automated verification of code changes
descriptions.insights: Generate a report analyzing your Claude Code sessions
descriptions.install-github-app: Set up Claude GitHub Actions for a repository
descriptions.keybindings: Open or create your keybindings configuration file
descriptions.logout: Sign out from your Anthropic account
descriptions.loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo, defaults to 10m)
descriptions.plan: Enable plan mode or view the current session plan
descriptions.pr-comments: Get comments from a GitHub pull request
descriptions.privacy-settings: View and update your privacy settings
descriptions.reload-plugins: Activate pending plugin changes in the current session
descriptions.security-review: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch
descriptions.simplify: Review changed code for reuse, quality, and efficiency, then fix any issues found.
descriptions.stats: Show your Claude Code usage statistics and activity
descriptions.status: Show Claude Code status including version, model, account, API connectivity, and tool statuses
descriptions.think-back: Your 2025 Claude Code Year in Review
descriptions.upgrade: Upgrade to Max for higher rate limits and more Opus
descriptions.vim: Toggle between Vim and Normal editing modes
